title: Kyoo mo Watashi no Koto Kau
description: They say she'll let you do anything if you just pay, or something like that. Mio Hazuki, who sits next to me, is the subject of such rumors, but she doesn't look the part at all...! Her voice is incredibly quiet, she's fundamentally taciturn, and even if you speak to her, her eyes won't meet yours... plus, her chest is small. Just as I was thinking rumors are nothing more than rumors, I ended up seeing it in an empty classroom after school. The exact scene of her doing compensated dating with a guy—. What's more, her demeanor was completely different from when she's in the classroom, and despite it being compensated dating, she had a sweet expression just like a couple who just started dating..
author: @sui_road
